managePiBillingAddress
eventScript.func:
const data = this.getValues();

this.toView({
  target: "1905102178127777793",
  targetType: "Page",
  mode: "dialog",
  type: "add",
  position: "right",
  title: "Manage Billing Address",
  params: {
    address_purpose: "Billing",
    address_line1: data.billing_address_line_1,
    address_line2: data.billing_address_line_2,
    address_line3: data.billing_address_line_3,
    address_line4: data.billing_address_line_4,
    city: data.billing_address_city,
    postal_code: data.billing_postal_code,
    state: data.billing_address_state,
    country: data.billing_address_country,
    moduleName: "pi",
    customerId: "None",
    address_name: data.billing_address_name,
    address_phone: data.billing_address_phone,
    address_attention: data.billing_attention,
    supplierId: this.getValue("supplier_name"),
    acc_integration_type: data.acc_integration_type,
    address_fax: data.billing_address_fax
  },
});

eventScript.name: managePiShippingAddress
eventScript.func:
const data = this.getValues();

this.toView({
  target: "1905102178127777793",
  targetType: "Page",
  mode: "dialog",
  type: "add",
  position: "right",
  title: "Manage Shipping Address",
  params: {
    address_purpose: "Shipping",
    address_line1: data.shipping_address_line_1,
    address_line2: data.shipping_address_line_2,
    address_line3: data.shipping_address_line_3,
    address_line4: data.shipping_address_line_4,
    city: data.shipping_address_city,
    postal_code: data.shipping_postal_code,
    state: data.shipping_address_state,
    country: data.shipping_address_country,
    moduleName: "pi",
    customerId: "None",
    address_name: data.shipping_address_name,
    address_phone: data.shipping_address_phone,
    address_attention: data.shipping_attention,
    supplierId: this.getValue("supplier_name"),
    acc_integration_type: data.acc_integration_type,
    address_fax: data.shipping_address_fax
  },
});

eventScript.name: onChange_fake_po
onChange_plant
eventScript.func:
(async () => {
  const plant = arguments[0]?.value;

  this.hide(['address_grid', 'total_amount_myr', 'myr_total_amount'])

  this.setData({
    ref_type: 'Document',
    doc_type: '',

    po_no_display: '',
    gr_no_display: '',

    gr_id: '',
    po_id: '',

    supplier_name: '',
    currency_code: '',
    pi_billing_address: '',
    pi_shipping_address: '',

    agent_id: '',
    invoice_payment_term_id: '',
    exchange_rate: '',
    exchange_rate_currency: '',

    table_pi: [],

    total_gross_currency: '',
    total_discount_currency: '',
    total_tax_currency: '',
    total_amount_currency: '',

    billing_address_line_1: '',
    billing_address_line_2: '',
    billing_address_line_3: '',
    billing_address_line_4: '',

    billing_address_city: '',
    billing_postal_code: '',
    billing_address_state: '',
    billing_address_country: '',

    billing_address_name: '',
    billing_address_phone: '',
    billing_attention: '',
    billing_address_fax: '',

    shipping_address_line_1: '',
    shipping_address_line_2: '',
    shipping_address_line_3: '',
    shipping_address_line_4: '',

    shipping_address_city: '',
    shipping_postal_code: '',
    shipping_address_state: '',
    shipping_address_country: '',

    shipping_address_name: '',
    shipping_address_phone: '',
    shipping_attention: '',
    shipping_address_fax: ''
  })

  if(plant){
      this.disabled([
         'agent_id', 'invoice_date', 'invoice_payment_term_id',
        'pi_description', 'remarks', 'pi_ref_doc', 'table_pi'
       ], false);
       
      this.hide([
        'po_no_display',
        'gr_no_display',
      ]);
  }
})();
